summary: Frontend-only verification of (1) AuthGate password '63-G1' with denied modal and (2) 5-phase navigation with cartridge data relocated to Fase 5. All 4 review scenarios pass on the live preview URL.

issues: Pre-existing hydration warning: x-source instrumentation injects a <span> inside <option>. Cosmetic, not introduced by this iteration.

critical_code_review_comments: AuthGate.jsx is correct: PASSWORD='63-G1', localStorage key fclass_authed='1', denied modal text exactly 'No está usted autorizado a usar esta aplicación', auth-denied-ok dismisses and clears pwd. Mounted in App.js wrapping all routes.
PhaseNav.jsx lists 5 phases with Fase 5 = 'Datos del cartucho'. Grid is lg:grid-cols-5. phase-tab-1..5 testids present.
Phase4.jsx now only renders the primer-section (Escalera de seating del pistón). No cartridge-section, no cartridge SVG. Verified via live DOM: cartridge-section count=0 on Fase 4.

Phase5.jsx renders the cartridge-section with CartridgeDiagram (cartridge-svg) and cart-a..cart-f inputs. collect-cartridge-btn copies auto-derived values from Fase 1/3/4 into cart state via saveData({cartridge}).
Home.jsx renders Phase5 when phase===5 (line 209). saveData has 700ms debounce + flush on visibilitychange/beforeunload.

Persistence verified on reload+reselect: cart-d='0.015' (manual override) survives full page reload + project re-selection. Other collected values (c=0.343, c1=0.338, e=0.129, f=1.628, b=2.005) also persisted in fclass_projects[*].data.cartridge.

Non-blocking observation (carried over from iteration 5): pocket-depth and primer-height in Fase 4 still only persist when 'Generar escalera' or 'Recoger medidas' is pressed; typing alone is not debounced-saved. Consider persisting onChange for consistency.
test_credentials: Access password: 63-G1 (offline localStorage, no backend auth).
seed_data_creation: Project '.308 Winchester / Lapua / P5' created in browser localStorage (key fclass_projects).
context_for_next_testing_agent: To reach the app first pass AuthGate with '63-G1' (localStorage fclass_authed='1'). To test wrong-password popup, run localStorage.clear() then reload so the gate re-appears. Cartridge data has been MOVED from Fase 4 to Fase 5; Fase 4 now is primer-only. phase-tab-5 testid exists. cart-* testids live under Phase5.jsx. saveData debounce is 700ms; wait >=1000ms after the last input fill before reading localStorage. project-select and new-caliber are <select> elements - use select_option().

test_run_evidence.auth_gate_before_login: auth-input and auth-submit visible; app-title and project-select hidden (verified via is_visible=False).
test_run_evidence.wrong_password_modal_text: 'No está usted autorizado a usar esta aplicaciónCerrar' (modal contains exact required string).
test_run_evidence.correct_password_unlocks: After typing '63-G1' + submit, app-title visible, project-select visible, localStorage.fclass_authed=='1'.
test_run_evidence.reload_persists_unlock: After reload auth-input count=0 and app-title still visible.
test_run_evidence.fase4_primer_only: primer-section visible, cartridge-section count = 0 on Fase 4.
test_run_evidence.fase5_cartridge_section: cartridge-section visible, cartridge-svg visible, cart-a..cart-f inputs present.
test_run_evidence.collect_results: After collect: c=0.343, c1=0.338, e=0.129, f=1.628, b=2.005 (a empty - Fase 3 seating not seeded, by design).
test_run_evidence.manual_override_persists: cart-d set to 0.015 -> reload -> reselect project -> Fase 5 -> cart-d reads '0.015'.

rca of the issue: Not applicable - all reviewed features working as designed.
